search.miss_risk_note: retrieve_verify ranks every scan frame with a non-generative image-text encoder, then verifies only the best candidate windows with the VL model. Very short events can still be missed if retrieval does not rank them near the top. Lower score_threshold, increase max_candidate_windows, or reduce scan_interval_seconds to widen the search.
